name: @ptdl/plugin-data-visualization-echarts-pro
description: A flexible ECharts chart type for the Data Visualization block: line, area, bar, column, pie and scatter with smooth/stack/donut/legend/label toggles, custom fonts and number formatting, a JS data transform, and a raw ECharts option override for full control.
description.zh-CN: 为数据可视化区块提供更灵活的 ECharts 图表类型：自定义字体、数字格式、数据转换（JS）与原始 ECharts option 覆盖（JSON style）。
